mnemonics: CAP Theorem: Choose two of three (Consistency, Availability, Partition Tolerance) - like picking two toppings for your data pizza.
keyPoints: Understand the trade-offs between Consistency, Availability, and Partition Tolerance in distributed systems.
Recognize how different database types (CP, AP, CA) handle network partitions.
Apply CAP theorem principles to real-world big data system design decisions.
commonMistakes: Thinking CA systems exist in distributed environments (they don't, as network partitions are inevitable).
Believing CAP theorem applies to all database operations (it primarily applies during network partition events).
